name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare graham cracker crust and press into the base and sides of a 9-inch spring form pan. Refrigerate.
2. Melt 6 oz. bittersweet chocolate with 1/4 cup rum over low heat. Set aside to cool slightly.
3. Beat 1 lb. cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually beat in 3/4 cup extra fine sugar, 1/2 cup sour cream, and 1 Tbsp vanilla extract into the cream cheese mixture. Mix well.
5. Add 4 large eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Place the bowl over hot water and stir until smooth.
6. Pour 10 oz. of batter into a separate bowl and set aside.
7. Mix the remaining batter with melted chocolate and stir over hot water until smooth.
8. Remove the spring form pan from the refrigerator and fill it with chocolate batter.
9. Gently pour the plain batter over the top, making swirls with a fork.
10. Bake at 325°F for 50 minutes. Cool to room temperature, remove the rim, and refrigerate overnight.
